application.name: 关键词·红包|卡券|积分
application.ability: 多关键词红包，卡券，积分，适合节日营销！
application.description: 多关键词红包，卡券，积分，适合节日营销！
application.author: 微赞

manifest.install: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_meili_red_fans` ( `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(11) DEFAULT '0', `rid` int(11) DEFAULT '0', `from_user` varchar(50) DEFAULT '' COMMENT '用户ID', `nickname` varchar(50) DEFAULT '', `headimgurl` varchar(500) DEFAULT '', `username` varchar(50) DEFAULT '', `tel` varchar(20) DEFAULT '' COMMENT '登记信息(手机等)', `totalnum` int(11) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '总次数', `todaynum` int(11) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '今天次数', `lasttime` int(11) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '最后时间', `dateline` int(10) DEFAULT '0', `status` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '1', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `rid` (`rid`), KEY `uniacid` (`uniacid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8 ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_meili_red_msgid` ( `id` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', `msgid` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `time` varchar(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8 ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_meili_red_prize` ( `id` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT '0', `rid` int(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `prizeodds` int(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `prizesum` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `type` tinyint(4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `min_money` varchar(16) DEFAULT '', `max_money` varchar(16) DEFAULT '', `cardid` varchar(100) DEFAULT '', `total_num` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `url` varchar(255) DEFAULT '', `txt` varchar(255) DEFAULT '', `credit` int(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `time` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `rid` (`rid`), KEY `uniacid` (`uniacid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8 ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_meili_red_reply` ( `id` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `rid` int(10) unsigned DEFAULT '0', `uniacid` int(11) DEFAULT '0', `title` varchar(50) DEFAULT '', `start_picurl` varchar(500) DEFAULT '', `start_theme` varchar(50) DEFAULT '', `start_instruction` varchar(200) DEFAULT '', `end_theme` varchar(50) DEFAULT '', `end_instruction` varchar(200) DEFAULT '', `end_picurl` varchar(500) DEFAULT '', `starttime` int(10) DEFAULT '0', `endtime` int(10) DEFAULT '0', `number_times` int(11) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '总游戏次数', `most_num_times` int(11) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '每天游戏次数', `status` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0', `dateline` int(10) DEFAULT '0', `xzlx` int(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `area` text NOT NULL, `iskeyword` int(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `iptype` int(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `rid` (`rid`), KEY `uniacid` (`uniacid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8 ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_meili_red_user` ( `id` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `rid` int(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `uniacid` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', `openid` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', `bopenid` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', `nickname` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', `money` varchar(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT '100', `headimgurl` varchar(500) DEFAULT '', `time` varchar(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', `status` tinyint(4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `salt` varchar(32) DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `rid` (`rid`), KEY `uniacid` (`uniacid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8 ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC;
